# BP-101 positive variant: an inline net/http handler uses the writer directly.
lang: go
file: BP-101-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

var route = http.HandlerFunc(func(writer http.ResponseWriter, request *http.Request) {
	writer.Write([]byte("ok"))
	writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
})
